one_time_description: First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP - non-recurring gaming revenue share received in 2020 (not in prior year)
economic_notes: GBEs include Centre Creek Limited Partnership (property acquisition/management), Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Forestry Limited Partnership (forestry activities), and Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Tribe Society (property rental and management). Capital project in progress of $376,167 on balance sheet.
notes: GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (not consolidated). Accounts receivable includes $7,767 trade AR, $86,475 property taxes receivable, and $14,844 Ottawa Trust Funds. Gaming revenue of $241,832 from First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP appears non-recurring (zero in prior year). Deferred revenue includes unspent ISC Risk Management and Community Based Well-Being funding. No remuneration schedule included in financial statements. COVID-19 risk note included.
